Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger

Class LedgerEntry

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger.LedgerEntry
public class LedgerEntry extends Object
Represents a single entry in a ledger, potentially supporting splits across multiple accounts or funds. This class holds details such as date, check number, payee/payer, memo, budget tracking information, and amounts distributed to various account and fund combinations. The structure with fields like `amount2`, `assetAccount2`, etc., suggests it can handle up to four splits or components for a single transaction.

  • Constructor Details

    • LedgerEntry

      public LedgerEntry()
      Default constructor for LedgerEntry. Initializes all fields to their default values (null for Strings, 0.0 for doubles).

  • Method Details

    • getAccountType

      public String getAccountType()
      Determines the primary account type based on which account field (asset, income, or expense) is populated for the first part of the entry. It checks assetAccount, then incomeAccount, then expenseAccount. If none are populated, it returns "Unknown".
      Returns:
      A string representing the account type ("Asset", "Income", "Expense", or "Unknown").

    • getEntryDate

      public String getEntryDate()
      Gets the entry date.
      Returns:
      The entry date string.

    • getCheckNumber

      public String getCheckNumber()
      Gets the check number associated with this entry.
      Returns:
      The check number string, or null if not applicable.

    • isCleared

      public String isCleared()
      Gets the cleared status of this entry.
      Returns:
      The cleared status string (e.g., "Yes", "No").

    • getToFrom

      public String getToFrom()
      Gets the payee or payer of this transaction.
      Returns:
      The 'to/from' party string.

    • getMemoString

      public String getMemoString()
      Gets the memo or description for this entry.
      Returns:
      The memo string.

    • getBudgetTracking

      public String getBudgetTracking()
      Gets the budget tracking information for this entry.
      Returns:
      The budget tracking string.

    • getAmount

      public double getAmount()
      Gets the amount for the first part of this entry.

      The amount as a double.

      public String getFundName()
      Gets the fund name associated with the first part of this entry.

      The fund name string.
